title: Macrolenes muscosa
taxonomy: Macrolenes muscosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The classification of Macrolenes muscosa is typically as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Magnoliophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Celastrales, Family: Celastraceae, Genus: Macrolenes, Species: M. muscosa. intro: Macrolenes muscosa, also known as Brazilian peppertree, is a shrub or small tree native to South America that has been naturalized in parts of the United States.
